reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención.  Almorzamos en la YPF. Bien ubicada. Le faltaría un poco mas de sombra y un espacio para descansar un rato de la ruta.
Tiene dormis pero nosotros no nos quedamos porque seguimos manejando.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. We had lunch at the YPF gas station. It's well located. It could use a bit more shade and a place to rest for a while after driving. They have dormitories, but we didn't stay there because we continued driving.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoeExxYVRREAE

reviews.comment:
Este lugar no ofrece ningún alimento sin tacc, es bueno saberlo pq si uno quiere parar a almorzar no presenta ninguna opción apta Celíacos.

(Translated by Google)
This place doesn't offer any gluten-free food, which is good to know because if you want to stop for lunch, there are no options suitable for celiacs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoaU9lNkZREAE
